ref: But the renters grabbed those servants. They beat up one, killed one, and stoned one of them to death.
text: Kyɛ a wɛkaareba da nyɔge la a gbaŋgbaare, a ŋmɛ kaŋ, a ko kaŋ, kyɛ za a kaŋ ne kubo.
translated: Then he went to the water, he saw, he ate, he came, and he called his friends and the people.

ref: God will bless everyone who doesn't reject me because of what I do.”
text: Zunoɔ soba la neɛ na zaa naŋ ba bonnɔ ma.” Yeezu Naŋ Puu A Gyɔɔn Bati
translated: We believe in one God, Jesus Our Lord and Savior

ref: When people mistreat you in one town, hurry to another one. I promise you before you have gone to all the towns of Israel, the Son of Man will come.
text: Ka ba naŋ wa dɔgrɔ yɛ teŋɛ kaŋ poɔ, yɛ zo gaa teŋyuo. Yelmeŋɛ ka N yele korɔ yɛ, yɛ koŋ baŋ kyɔle a Izerayɛl tenne zaa sɛre kyɛ ka a Nensaala Bie leɛ wa.
translated: And we ate the food that they took to our father; their children came to the place. Yelmeŋɛ told them that the king of Israel's people had done this to the house of Nensaala Bie.

ref: Which one of the sons obeyed his father? “The older one,” the chief priests and leaders answered. Then Jesus told them: You can be sure tax collectors and prostitutes will get into the kingdom of God before you ever will!
text: A ba bayi poɔ, buo soba la da e lɛ o saa naŋ boɔrɔ?” Ka ba yeli, “A dɛndɛŋ soba na.” Ka Yeezu yeli ko ba, “Yelmeŋɛ ka N yele korɔ yɛ, a zuyɔɔ-derebɛ ane a gyɛnterre daŋna yɛ la kpeɛrɛ a Naaŋmen naaloŋ poɔ.
translated: When you were sent, did you find the king in the city? He said to him, "I found the king." Jesus said to him, "Go and heal the sick and the lame, and you will see the kingdom of heaven."

ref: leave your gift there in front of the altar. Make peace with that person, then come back and offer your gift to God.
text: bare a fo kyɔɔtaa a Naaŋmen bagmaalkuuri niŋeŋ kyɛ daŋ gaa ka fo ne a fo tɔsoba na te maale taa sɛre, kyɛ ka fo pãã leɛ wa tere a fo kyɔɔtaa.
translated: When he eats with the Word of Truth and he says come, and he will work until the end without dying, and he will sleep again when he eats.
